name: NAS Integrity Check Fail
description: Verify NAS signalling message integrity check fail occurs as specified
steps: Send NAS signalling message with integrity check fail
Wait for NAS response
Verify NAS response indicates integrity check fail

name: NAS Integrity Check Fail Edge Case
description: Trigger arrives in unexpected state or timing
preconditions: NAS signalling message sent in a short time frame
steps: Send NAS signalling message with integrity check fail
Wait for NAS response
Verify NAS response indicates integrity check fail
Send NAS signalling message with integrity check fail again in a short time frame

name: AUTHENTICATION_FAILURE_NORMAL
description: Verify AUTHENTICATION FAILURE hazard occurs as specified
steps: 1. UE initiates authentication procedure
2. Network responds with AUTHENTICATION FAILURE
3. UE receives authentication failure and stops timer T3460

name: AUTHENTICATION_FAILURE_EDGE_CASE
description: Trigger arrives in unexpected state or timing
steps: 1. UE initiates authentication procedure
2. Network responds with AUTHENTICATION FAILURE, but with incorrect timing
3. UE receives authentication failure and stops timer T3460

name: AUTH_REJECT_Hazard_NORMAL
description: Verify AUTHENTICATION REJECT hazard occurs as specified
steps: UE receives AUTHENTICATION REJECT from network
UE sets update status to EU3 ROAMING NOT ALLOWED
UE deletes GUTI, TAI list, last visited registered TAI, and KSI from USIM
UE aborts all EMM signalling procedures
UE stops timers T3410, T3417, T3430
UE enters EMM-DER state
expected_operations: delete GUTI, TAI list, last visited registered TAI, and KSI from USIM

name: AUTH_REJECT_Hazard_EDGE_CASE
description: Trigger arrives in unexpected state or timing
preconditions: Network sends AUTHENTICATION REJECT in unexpected timing
steps: UE receives AUTHENTICATION REJECT from network in unexpected timing
UE sets update status to EU3 ROAMING NOT ALLOWED
UE deletes GUTI, TAI list, last visited registered TAI, and KSI from USIM
UE aborts all EMM signalling procedures
UE stops timers T3410, T3417, T3430
UE enters EMM-DER state
Network sends AUTHENTICATION REJECT again before UE enters EMM-DER state
expected_operations: delete GUTI, TAI list, last visited registered TAI, and KSI from USIM

name: AUTH Failure Test
description: Verify AUTHENTICATION FAILURE hazard occurs as specified
steps: 1. Send AUTHENTICATION FAILURE to UE
2. UE responds with EMM-DEREGISTERED
3. Verify RAND and RES are deleted and T3418 is stopped

name: Edge Case Test
description: Trigger arrives in unexpected state or timing
steps: 1. Send AUTHENTICATION FAILURE to UE while T3418 is still running
2. UE responds with EMM-DEREGISTERED but T3418 is not stopped
3. Verify RAND and RES are deleted but T3418 is not stopped
4. Send AUTHENTICATION FAILURE again while T3418 is still running
5. Verify UE responds with EMM-DEREGISTERED and T3418 is stopped

name: ATTACH_REJECT_Hazard_NORMAL
description: Verify ATTACH REJECT hazard occurs as specified
steps: Step 1: UE receives ATTACH REJECT message
Step 2: UE stops timer T3410
Step 3: UE enters EMM-DEREGISTERED state

name: ATTACH_REJECT_Hazard_EDGE_CASE
description: Trigger arrives in unexpected state or timing
preconditions: Network sends ATTACH REJECT message with unexpected parameters
steps: Step 1: UE receives ATTACH REJECT message with unexpected parameters
Step 2: UE fails to stop timer T3410
Step 3: UE enters unexpected state
expected_operations: UE fails to stop timer T3410

name: detach_request_hazard
description: Verify DETACH REQUEST hazard occurs as specified
steps: Send DETACH REQUEST
Start timer T3421
Wait for timer T3421 to expire
Verify EMM-DEREGISTERED-INITIATED state
Verify DETACH REQUEST hazard occurred

name: detach_request_hazard_edge_case
description: Trigger arrives in unexpected state or timing
steps: Send DETACH REQUEST
Wait for 1ms
Verify EMM-DEREGISTERED-INITIATED state
Verify DETACH REQUEST hazard occurred

name: detach_request_hazard_normal
description: Verify the hazard occurs as specified
steps: Send DETACH REQUEST to network
Wait for DETACH REQUEST to arrive
Verify EPS bearer contexts are deactivated locally
Verify UE enters EMM-DEREGISTERED state

name: detach_request_hazard_edge_case
description: Trigger arrives in unexpected state or timing
steps: Send DETACH REQUEST to network with delayed timing
Wait for DETACH REQUEST to arrive with incorrect timing
Verify EPS bearer contexts are not deactivated locally
Verify UE does not enter EMM-DEREGISTERED state
expected_operations: EPS bearer contexts not deactivated locally

name: detach_request_hazard_normal
description: Verify the hazard occurs as specified
steps: Send DETACH REQUEST to UE
Wait for EPS bearer context deactivation
Verify timer T3422 starts
Verify EPS bearer context is deactivated

name: detach_request_hazard_edge_case
description: Trigger arrives in unexpected state or timing
steps: Send DETACH REQUEST to UE
Wait for EPS bearer context deactivation
Verify timer T3422 starts
Verify EPS bearer context is deactivated
Send DETACH REQUEST again before timer T3422 expires

name: detach_request_hazard_normal
description: Verify the hazard occurs as specified
steps: Send DETACH REQUEST to UE
Wait for MME to deactivate all EPS bearer contexts
Verify MME enters EMM-DEREGISTERED state

name: detach_request_hazard_edge_case
description: Trigger arrives in unexpected state or timing
steps: Send DETACH REQUEST to UE with unexpected MME state
Wait for MME to react to unexpected state
Verify MME enters EMM-DEREGISTERED state or unexpected behavior
expected_operations: Deactivate all EPS bearer contexts or unexpected behavior

name: Normal Detach Accept Hazard Test
description: Verify the hazard occurs as specified
steps: Trigger DETACH ACCEPT (network->UE)
Wait for 10 seconds to allow timer T3422 to start
Verify UE is in EMM-DEREGISTERED state
Trigger stop timer T3422
Verify UE is in EMM-DEREGISTERED state after stop timer T3422

name: Edge Case Detach Accept Hazard Test
description: Trigger arrives in unexpected state or timing
steps: Trigger DETACH ACCEPT (network->UE) while UE is in EMM-DEREGISTERED state
Wait for 5 seconds to allow timer T3422 to start
Trigger stop timer T3422
Verify UE is not in EMM-DEREGISTERED state after stop timer T3422
Verify UE is in an unexpected state

name: Normal Test
description: Verify hazard occurs as specified
preconditions: MME is tracking area updating initiated
steps: 1. Send TRACKING AREA UPDATE ACCEPT to UE
2. Wait for EMM-REGISTERED state
3. Send MME deactivation request for inactive bearer contexts
4. Verify UE deactivates bearer contexts locally
5. Verify MME deactivates bearer contexts locally

name: Edge Case Test
description: Trigger arrives in unexpected state or timing
preconditions: MME is tracking area updating initiated
steps: 1. Send TRACKING AREA UPDATE ACCEPT to UE
2. Wait for EMM-REGISTERED state
3. Simulate unexpected MME state (e.g. EMM-TRACKING-AREA-UPDATING-INITIATED)
4. Send MME deactivation request for inactive bearer contexts
5. Verify UE deactivates bearer contexts locally
6. Verify MME deactivates bearer contexts locally

name: Track Update Reject Normal
description: Verify tracking area update reject triggers UE to stop timer T3430 and take corresponding actions
preconditions: Network sends tracking area update reject
steps: 1. UE receives tracking area update reject from network
2. UE stops timer T3430
3. UE takes corresponding actions based on reject cause value
4. UE transitions to EMM-DEREGISTERED state

name: Track Update Reject Edge Case
description: Verify tracking area update reject triggers UE to stop timer T3430 and take corresponding actions in unexpected state or timing
preconditions: Network sends tracking area update reject with unexpected reject cause value
steps: 1. UE receives tracking area update reject from network with unexpected reject cause value
2. UE stops timer T3430
3. UE takes corresponding actions based on unexpected reject cause value
4. UE transitions to unexpected state or timing

name: ACTIVATE DEDICATED EPS BEARER CONTEXT REJECT
description: Verify ACTIVATE DEDICATED EPS BEARER CONTEXT REJECT hazard occurs as specified
preconditions: MME is in BEARER CONTEXT ACTIVE PENDING state
UE sends ACTIVATE DEDICATED EPS BEARER CONTEXT REJECT message
steps: MME receives ACTIVATE DEDICATED EPS BEARER CONTEXT REJECT message
MME aborts dedicated EPS bearer context activation procedure
MME updates BEARER CONTEXT ACTIVE PENDING state to BEARER CONTEXT INACTIVE state
expected_operations: abort dedicated EPS bearer context activation procedure

name: UNEXPECTED BEARER CONTEXT UPDATE
description: Trigger arrives in unexpected state or timing
preconditions: MME is in BEARER CONTEXT ACTIVE PENDING state
steps: MME receives unexpected message
MME attempts to process unexpected message
MME fails to update BEARER CONTEXT ACTIVE PENDING state
expected_operations: abort dedicated EPS bearer context activation procedure

name: Normal Test
description: Verify the SESSION MANAGEMENT CONFIGURATION REJECT hazard occurs as specified
preconditions: UE is in BEARER CONTEXT MODIFY PENDING state
steps: Send UE a SESSION MANAGEMENT CONFIGURATION REJECT message from the network
Wait for the MME to process the message
Verify the MME enters the BEARER CONTEXT ACTIVE state and aborts the dedicated bearer context modification procedure
expected_operations: abort dedicated bearer context modification procedure

name: Edge Case Test
description: Trigger arrives in unexpected state or timing
preconditions: UE is in BEARER CONTEXT MODIFY PENDING state, MME is in unexpected state
steps: Send UE a SESSION MANAGEMENT CONFIGURATION REJECT message from the network
Simulate unexpected MME state or timing
Verify the MME does not enter the BEARER CONTEXT ACTIVE state or aborts the dedicated bearer context modification procedure incorrectly
expected_operations: incorrect abort dedicated bearer context modification procedure

name: normal_test
description: Verify SESSION MANAGEMENT CONFIGURATION REQUEST deactivates EPS bearer context
steps: 1. Send SESSION MANAGEMENT CONFIGURATION REQUEST to UE
2. Wait for EPS bearer context to deactivate
3. Verify EPS bearer context is inactive

name: edge_case_test
description: Verify SESSION MANAGEMENT CONFIGURATION REQUEST deactivates EPS bearer context in unexpected state or timing
steps: 1. Send SESSION MANAGEMENT CONFIGURATION REQUEST to UE
2. Wait for EPS bearer context to deactivate
3. Verify EPS bearer context is inactive despite unexpected UE state

name: normal_test
description: Verify the hazard occurs as specified
steps: Send SESSION MANAGEMENT CONFIGURATION REQUEST to MME
Wait for MME to process request
Verify MME sends BEARER CONTEXT RELEASE to UE
Verify UE deletes EPS bearer context identified by EPS bearer identity

name: edge_case_test
description: Trigger arrives in unexpected state or timing
preconditions: Timing between request and response delayed
steps: Send SESSION MANAGEMENT CONFIGURATION REQUEST to MME with delayed timing
Wait for MME to process request
Verify MME sends BEARER CONTEXT RELEASE to UE
Verify UE deletes EPS bearer context identified by EPS bearer identity within expected time frame

name: PDN Disconnect Request Hazard Test
description: Verify the MME releases all resources reserved for the PDN in the network after a PDN disconnect request
preconditions: MME is in BEARER CONTEXT ACTIVE state
PDN is active in the network
steps: Step 1: Send PDN disconnect request from network to UE
Step 2: Wait for MME to process the request
Step 3: Verify MME releases all resources reserved for the PDN

name: PDN Disconnect Request Hazard Test - Edge Case
description: Trigger arrives in unexpected state or timing
preconditions: MME is in BEARER CONTEXT ACTIVE state
PDN is active in the network
steps: Step 1: Send PDN disconnect request from network to UE while MME is under heavy load
Step 2: Wait for MME to process the request
Step 3: Verify MME releases all resources reserved for the PDN despite being under heavy load
